cms.task_text: Naprogramujte želvu, aby nakreslila [hlp]cik-cak vzor[/hlp] se 4 zuby. Každý zub: [hlp]jděte dopředu 30 pixelů[/hlp], [hlp]zatočte doprava[/hlp], [hlp]zvedněte pero[/hlp], přesuňte se o 10 pixelů, [hlp]spusťte pero[/hlp], [hlp]zatočte doleva[/hlp]. Použijte [hlp]smyčku[/hlp] pro opakování.
cms.start_blocks_xml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="controls_repeat_ext" x="50" y="50"><value name="TIMES"><shadow type="math_number"><field name="NUM">4</field></shadow></value><statement name="DO"><block type="turtle_forward"><field name="DISTANCE">30</field><next><block type="turtle_right"><field name="ANGLE">90</field><next><block type="turtle_pen_up"><next><block type="turtle_forward"><field name="DISTANCE">10</field><next><block type="turtle_pen_down"><next><block type="turtle_left"><field name="ANGLE">90</field></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></statement></block></xml>
cms.spravna_odpoved_xml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="controls_repeat_ext" x="50" y="50"><value name="TIMES"><shadow type="math_number"><field name="NUM">4</field></shadow></value><statement name="DO"><block type="turtle_forward"><field name="DISTANCE">30</field><next><block type="turtle_right"><field name="ANGLE">90</field><next><block type="turtle_pen_up"><next><block type="turtle_forward"><field name="DISTANCE">10</field><next><block type="turtle_pen_down"><next><block type="turtle_left"><field name="ANGLE">90</field></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></statement></block></xml>
